rss_news.title: [RSS] OpenAI helps Hyatt advance AI among colleagues
rss_news.summary: Hyatt deploys ChatGPT Enterprise across its global workforce, using GPT-5.4 and Codex to improve productivity, operations, and guest experiences.

rss_news.title: [RSS] Anthropic takes $5B from Amazon and pledges $100B in cloud spending in return
rss_news.summary: Amazon has made another circular AI deal: It's investing another $5 billion in Anthropic. Anthropic has agreed to spend $100 billion on AWS in return.

rss_news.title: [RSS] Google rolls out Gemini in Chrome in 7 new countries
rss_news.summary: Google is rolling out Gemini in Chrome in Australia, Indonesia, Japan, the Philippines, Singapore, South Korea, and Vietnam. The company is rolling this feature out to both desktop and iOS in all of these countries except Japan.

rss_news.title: [RSS] It’s not just one thing — it’s another thing
rss_news.summary: This sentence construction ("It's not just this — it's that") has become so common in AI-generated writing that it's no longer just a clue that a piece of writing may be synthetic — it's almost a guarantee.

rss_news.title: [RSS] NSA spies are reportedly using Anthropic’s Mythos, despite Pentagon feud
rss_news.summary: NSA is said to be using Anthropic's restricted Mythos AI model.
